message:
Command `
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v (full) ==="
cat "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v"

echo ""
echo "=== core.v module definition check ==="
grep "^module" "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/core.v" | head -5
grep "^module" "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" | head -3
` executed with exit code 0.
